payload.answer: Detected three durable architecture decisions and two open questions. No conflicts or superseded facts were present in the input.
citations: Brain DB should be the source of truth
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent
Open questions - Should Telegram be added later?
Which model is cheapest while saturating performance?

entity_resolution.reason: The input identifies architecture components and open questions but does not require resolving them to existing entity IDs.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth for the Brain architecture.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection rather than the source of truth.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent for Brain.
It is undecided whether Telegram should be added later as a Brain integration.
It is undecided which model is cheapest while still saturating performance.

details: Committed architecture decisions as durable memory candidates.
Preserved Telegram and model-selection items as open questions, not decisions.
No deleted or superseded facts were presented as current.
